title: 2026 Winter Leagues
content:
# 2026 Winter Leagues

See the [ membership page](/index.php/leagues/membership) for info about membership options and pricing. Read more for league formats, dates, and other info.

Looking to play in a Wednesday Morning pick-up (Day Curling) game and not a member? Register [here.](/index.php/events/event-listings)

| Monday "I Hate Mondays" League (early evening) |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| ---------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **League Type:**                               | Open format, teams formed by coordinator.                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| **Who Can Join:**                              | Individual sign up. You may request teammates. Requests for complete team entries will be completed through discussion with the League Coordinator. Must have taken a Learn to Curl class or otherwise have previous curling experience. |
| **Capacity:**                                  | Maximum of 10 teams / 40 curlers.                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| **Dates:**                                     | January 12 through April 27 except March 2 and March 9.                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| **Draw Time:**                                 | 6:15 PM                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| **Coordinator:**                               | Nancy-Anne Potts                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |

| Monday Late League |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| ------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **League Type:**   | Open format, teams formed by coordinator.                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| **Who Can Join:**  | Individual sign up. You may request teammates. Requests for complete team entries will be completed through discussion with the League Coordinator. Must have taken a Learn to Curl class or otherwise have previous curling experience. |
| **Capacity:**      | Maximum of 10 teams / 40 curlers.                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| **Dates:**         | January 12 through April 27 except March 2 and March 9.                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| **Draw Time:**     | 8:30 PM                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| **Coordinator:**   | Alex Karsten                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |

| Tuesday Day League |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **League Type:**   | Open format, pickup style. Teams formed each week.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| **Who Can Join:**  | Individual sign up. All ages and abilities. You may request a teammate.                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| **Capacity:**      | 32 curlers per week.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Dates:**         | January 13 through April 28 except March 10.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Draw Time:**     | 10:00 AM                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| **Coordinator:**   | Russell Kandel                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| **Note:**          | This league is open for a limited number of drop-in curlers. No cost for members. Non-members pay $15 per session. This league is offered at a reduced rate for any curler choosing this as their only league. Members who play in other leagues may register for this league at no additional cost. |

| Tuesday Evening League |                                                                                              |
| ---------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **League Type:**       | Competitive - build your own team; entry into the league determined via playdowns as needed. |
| **Who Can Join:**      | Team or individual sign up. League Coordinator can assist individuals looking for a team.    |
| **Capacity:**          | Maximum of 20 teams / 80 curlers.                                                            |
| **Dates:**             | January 13 through April 28 except March 3 and March 10.                                     |
| **Draw Times:**        | 6:15 PM and 8:30 PM                                                                          |
| **Coordinator:**       | Christine Allen                                                                              |

| Wednesday Day League |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **League Type:**     | Open format, teams formed by coordinator.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| **Who Can Join:**    | Individual sign up. You may request a teammate.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Capacity:**        | Maximum of 36 curlers.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| **Dates:**           | January 14 through April 29 except March 11.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| **Draw Time:**       | 10:15 AM                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| **Coordinator:**     | Doug Brugler                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| **Note:**            | This league is open for a limited number of one-day registrations, for drop-in curling by members at no additional cost or by non-members for $15 per session. Separate instruction will be provided for those brand new to the game. This league is offered at a reduced rate for any curler choosing this as their only league. Members who play in other leagues may register for this league at no additional cost. |

| Wednesday Mad Hatter League (early evening) |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| ------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **League Type:**                            | Open format, teams formed by coordinator.                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| **Who Can Join:**                           | Individual sign up. You may request teammates. Requests for complete team entries will be completed through discussion with the League Coordinator. Must have completed a Learn to Curl class or otherwise have previous curling experience. |
| **Capacity:**                               | Maximum of 9 teams / 36 curlers.                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| **Dates:**                                  | January 14 through April 29 except March 4 and March 11.                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| **Draw Time:**                              | 6:15 PM                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| **Coordinator:**                            | Jim Sutton                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |

| Wednesday Hump Day League (late evening) |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ---------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **League Type:**                         | Open format, teams formed by skips' draft.                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| **Who Can Join:**                        | Individual sign up. Teammate requests and position preferences may not work out during the draft. Must have taken a Learn to Curl class or otherwise have previous curling experience. Apply with the League Coordinator to join the skip list. |
| **Capacity:**                            | Maximum of 10 teams / 40 curlers.                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| **Dates:**                               | January 14 through April 29 except March 4 and March 11.                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| **Draw Time:**                           | 8:30 PM                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Coordinator:**                         | Andrew Pearson                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |

| Thursday Diva League (early evening) |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| ------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **League Type:**                     | Open format, teams formed by coordinator.                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| **Who Can Join:**                    | Individual sign up. You may request teammates. Requests for complete team entries will be completed through discussion with the League Coordinator. Must have taken a Learn to Curl class or otherwise have previous curling experience. |
| **Capacity:**                        | Maximum of 9 teams / 36 curlers.                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Dates:**                           | January 15 through April 30 except February 26, March 5, March 12 and April 16.                                                                                                                                                          |
| **Draw Time:**                       | 6:15 PM                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| **Coordinator:**                     | Leah Janosko, Dina Gerber and Andrew Foulger                                                                                                                                                                                             |

| Thursday "Leaguey McLeagueface" League (late evening) |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| ----------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **League Type:**                                      | Open format, teams formed by coordinator. Flexibility on entry with a goal towards keeping parity in the league.                                                                                                                                      |
| **Who Can Join:**                                     | Individual sign up. You may request a teammate or team. Requests for complete team entries will be completed through discussion with the League Coordinator. Must have completed a Learn to Curl class or otherwise have previous curling experience. |
| **Capacity:**                                         | Maximum of 9 teams / 36 curlers.                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| **Dates:**                                            | January 15 through April 30 except February 26, March 5, March 12 and April 16.                                                                                                                                                                       |
| **Draw Time:**                                        | 8:30 PM                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| **Coordinator:**                                      | Brian Sewell                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |

| Friday Evening Leagues |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| ---------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **League Type:**       | Open format, teams formed by coordinator.                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| **Who Can Join:**      | Individual sign up. You may request teammates. Requests for complete team entries will be completed through discussion with the League Coordinator. Must have taken a Learn to Curl class or otherwise have previous curling experience. |
| **Capacity:**          | Maximum of 18 teams / 72 curlers.                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| **Dates:**             | January 16 through May 1 except February 27, March 6, March 13 and April 17.                                                                                                                                                             |
| **Draw Times:**        | 6:15 PM and 8:30 PM                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| **Coordinator:**       | Matt Liebhold and Mike Synnott                                                                                                                                                                                                           |

| Sunday Morning League |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| --------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **League Type:**      | Open format, teams formed by coordinator.                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| **Who Can Join:**     | Individual sign up. You may request teammates. Requests for complete team entries will be completed through discussion with the League Coordinator. Must have taken a Learn to Curl class or otherwise have previous curling experience. |
| **Capacity:**         | Maximum of 18 teams / 72 curlers.                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| **Dates:**            | January 11 through April 26 except March 1, March 15, April 5 and April 19.                                                                                                                                                              |
| **Draw Times:**       | 8:00 AM and 10:15 AM (10:15 will be a full draw with only as many games scheduled at 8:00 as needed for overflow).                                                                                                                       |
| **Coordinator:**      | David Geiger                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |

| Sunday "Not So Mixed" Doubles League |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| ------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **League Type:**                     | Teams of two, of any gender, registered as a team. Split into an Early League and a Late League.                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| **Who Can Join:**                    | You must own your own shoes and must have played at least one full season in a regular league. Recommend you be comfortable delivering and sweeping your own stone down the ice, but it is not a required skill especially if just starting doubles. We regret that we cannot accommodate wheelchair curlers in this league. |
| **Capacity:**                        | 9-10 teams per league.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| **Dates:**                           | January 11 through April 26 except April 5\. Early Doubles (4:00 PM) will also not be curling on March 15 and April 19.                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| **Draw Times:**                      | 4:00 PM and 5:45 PM                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| **Coordinator:**                     | Joe Garza and Connie Fernholz                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |

| Sunday Funday League (evening) |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| ------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **League Type:**               | Open format, teams formed by coordinator.                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| **Who Can Join:**              | Individual sign up. You may request teammates. Requests for complete team entries will be completed through discussion with the League Coordinator. Must have taken a Learn to Curl class or otherwise have previous curling experience. |
| **Capacity:**                  | Maximum of 9 teams / 36 curlers.                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Dates:**                     | January 11 through April 26 except April 5.                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| **Draw Time:**                 | 7:30 PM                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| **Coordinator:**               | Stephen Turcol                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |

| Saturday U3 League |                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **League Type:**   | Combined game play with some instruction. First 15-30 minutes will focus on skill building with an opportunity to improve skills during 6-end game play assisted by instructors. |
| **Who Can Join:**  | Anyone with at least one season of curling experience with up to 3 years of curling experience.                                                                                  |
| **Capacity:**      | Maximum of 36 curlers.                                                                                                                                                           |
| **Dates:**         | January 17 through April 25 except February 28, March 7, March 14 and April 18.                                                                                                  |
| **Draw Time:**     | 10:00 AM                                                                                                                                                                         |
| **Coordinator:**   | Jim Sutton and Paul Renaud                                                                                                                                                       |

Looking for our Sunday Juniors program? [Find it here](/index.php/curling/youthcurling).  
Leagues subject to change based on membership numbers.

**Questions or comments?**

**Leagues:** Jim Sutton - [contact email]**Membership:** Elise Mueller - [contact email]
